achievements: Migrated UI primitives shadcn/Radix → coss/Base UI + Tailwind v4
Big-file refactor: split sqlite.ts into sqlite/{schema,serialize,storage,types}, extracted health/ and sessions-calendar/ modules
SQLite delta-write: changedTaskIds diff + INSERT OR REPLACE replaces full snapshot DELETE+INSERT
Persist perf: cached JSON-string compare map, O(n²)→Set, skip normalizeAppState on non-task patch, UUID validation in IPC
Tier 2/3 closed: ipcHandlers extracted + tested, persist retry tests, pharmacokinetics tests, SQLite serialize/storage tests
Toast manager singleton split for non-visual imports; SQLite savePartial errors surface as toasts; failed patches stay pending for retry
Sidebar migrated to coss SidebarMenu primitives; ProjectPage list/board → coss Tabs
Per-theme token override persistence + legacy migration; light-theme contrast fixes (Activity icons, Health chart)
Task panels split: TaskCreatePanel/TaskEditPanel/TaskDetailPanel + TitleInput; metadata moved to side column
Due date calendar timezone off-by-one fixed (local day vs UTC ISO slice)
improvements: TaskEditPanel.tsx ~2433 tok still heavy — extract metadata side column + debounce hook
useCalendarDrag.ts ~2746 tok — extract pointer math + hit-testing helpers
EffectChart.tsx ~2502 tok — split chart series builder from render
task-form-fields.tsx ~2304 tok — split label/project/priority field groups
sqlite/storage.ts ~3163 tok and serialize.ts ~3224 tok — group by entity (tasks/projects/labels/sessions)
components/ui/sidebar.tsx ~6396 tok and drawer.tsx ~6743 tok — vendor primitives, isolate from src lint/format churn
Replace persist deep-compare cache with structural shallow-equal per-slice to drop JSON.stringify hot path entirely
Centralize Date parsing in calendar utils — multiple components still call new Date() per render
Audit useMemo deps in KanbanBoard.buildLabelMap and selectors.ts for stale-closure risks
next_tasks: Add e2e smoke test (Playwright) for create/edit/complete task + drag in Kanban + sessions calendar drag
Wire IPC handler unit tests into CI gate (currently exist but verify required check)
Backfill tests for store/domain/actions/{tasks,projects,sessions} — only domain-store.test.ts + persist.test.ts present
Add SQLite migration runner + version table — schema.ts is single-shot, no upgrade path
Telemetry: log persist retry counts + IPC error rates to surface silent failures
Keyboard shortcut help modal: audit coverage vs useKeyboardShortcuts hook registrations
Investigate bundle size — out/renderer/assets/index-CX6S-WSs.css is ~79k tok, likely Tailwind v4 not purging coss vendor
Document state schema invariants (stateSchema.ts) in AGENTS.md for future contributors
risks: schema.ts has no migration mechanism — any column add breaks existing user DBs
Persist retry queue lives in memory only — app crash before flush loses pending patches
Toast manager singleton imported from non-React modules — ensure no circular import with main.tsx provider
Large vendored ui/ files (sidebar 6396 tok, drawer 6743 tok, combobox 4291 tok) inflate type-check time and obscure local edits
useCalendarDrag.ts complexity high — pointer/hit-test logic untested, drag regressions likely on refactor
GlobalErrorBoundary catches render errors but async rejections in store actions may still bubble to console only
stateSchema.ts validates on hydration but partial saves bypass schema — corrupt patch could persist
Theme token override migration is one-way — no rollback if user downgrades app version
Geist Sans font + 6 new themes shipped without contrast audit on all surfaces (only Activity/Health verified)
out/ committed-looking artifacts in anatomy — verify .gitignore excludes build output
